ch1.title: Chapter 1
content: Welcome to Read Fluently. Today we will build your focus and your reading confidence.
When you see a word like [[neuroplasticity]], click it to see the meaning.

neuroplasticity.definition: Your brain’s ability to change and grow as you practice and learn.

ch2.title: Chapter 2
content: This is Chapter 2. We will practice reading with meaning.
Try to pause and think about the main idea after each paragraph.

ch1.title: Chapter 1
content: Nomsa stared at the screen. The word [[algorithm]] felt like a secret code.
Her brother smiled and said, “It’s just steps. Like a recipe.”

algorithm.definition: A set of steps used to solve a problem or complete a task.

main.title: Dictionary
content: Search and explore words here. (We’ll build the search next.)
